title: HP High Court Stenographer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: High Court of Himachal Pradesh (HP High Court) Stenographer Notification 2026 has been released on 21 May 2026 on the official website of the High Court of Himachal Pradesh. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the HP High Court Stenographer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, Junior Scale Stenographer with required experience and stenography/typing speed
qualification.details: Graduate Junior Scale Stenographers working in the High Court and Graduate Junior Scale Stenographers working in the District Judiciary in H.P., with experience of one year in case of Junior Scale Stenographers of the High Court of H.P. and three years in case of Junior Scale Stenographers from the District Judiciary. Candidates must be having speed of 100 W.P.M., in English Stenography and accurate transcription of the matter dictated within a period of 5 times to the time allotted for dictation and typing speed, in English, at 50 W.P.M., on computers.

salary_details.details: Pay Level 11 i.e. Rs. 38,500-1,22,700/- of the Pay Matrix

selection_process: Stenography Test Typing Test Proficiency Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for HP High Court Stenographer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HP High Court Stenographer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the HP High Court Stenographer recruitment is 10th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Stenographer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies available for the Stenographer post in the High Court of Himachal Pradesh.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates and possess experience as Junior Scale Stenographers, along with specific stenography and typing speeds.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Stenographer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in Pay Level 11, ranging from Rs. 38,500 to Rs. 1,22,700 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What are the key stages in the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Stenography Test, a Typing Test, and a Proficiency Test.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the High Court of Himachal Pradesh located?
faq.answer: The High Court of Himachal Pradesh is located in Shimla, Himachal Pradesh, with the pincode 171001.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is HHC/Recruit/HC/Steno/2025-I.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations provided for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age relaxations for reserved categories.
